{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration 216
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iteration 216]] is a world called [[Limit]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
